race.comment: ANGLESEA (2) ran a strong race first up over this route, showing speed and fighting on gamely for a narrow defeat. He can improve off that and maps for every chance here which could be key. ATELLA MISS (8) resumes off a long spell, now with the Matt Laurie yard. Two runs to date have been in town and she's won a jumpout leading in. Expecting a strong run. NEDHAMMER HEN (6) is a gelding by Vino Rosso on debut for the Michael Huglin yard. He's drawn very wide but has won a jumpout and can run well. DIVINE STRIDES (9) is a filly by Blue Point for the Sandhu yard who has jumped out well and should be ready to go.
